steps.t: Worms and Orcs can be found within Gath Ulunn, a cavern located among the Orc camps in the northern reaches of Gathbúrz. Ningloril has asked you to ga…
Ningloril is in Thangúlhad, the camp of the Golden Host in Gathbúrz. You have hindered the worm breeding program in Gath Ulunn and should tell Ninglor…
